{{Short description|Particle with no known substructure; fundamental constituent of matter}}
{{Infobox physics
| name = Elementary particle
| image = Standard Model of Elementary Particles.svg
| caption = The [[Standard Model]] of elementary particles.
| topics = [[Particle physics]], [[Standard Model]], [[Quantum mechanics]], [[Fermion]], [[Boson]]
}}

In [[particle physics]], an '''elementary particle''' (or '''fundamental particle''') is a [[subatomic particle]] that is not composed of other particles. Elementary particles are the fundamental building blocks of the [[universe]]; all other particles and [[matter]] are composed of combinations of these particles.

== Classification ==
Elementary particles fall into two main classes:

=== Fermions (matter particles) ===
{{Main|Fermion}}
Particles with half-integer [[spin (physics)|spin]] that make up matter:

'''[[Quark]]s''' (6 flavours):
* Up (<math>u</math>), Down (<math>d</math>) — constituents of [[proton]]s and [[neutron]]s
* Charm (<math>c</math>), Strange (<math>s</math>)
* Top (<math>t</math>), Bottom (<math>b</math>)

'''[[Lepton]]s''' (6 flavours):
* [[Electron]] (<math>e</math>), [[Muon]] (<math>\mu</math>), [[Tau (particle)|Tau]] (<math>\tau</math>)
* Electron neutrino (<math>\nu_e</math>), Muon neutrino (<math>\nu_\mu</math>), Tau neutrino (<math>\nu_\tau</math>)

=== Bosons (force carriers) ===
{{Main|Boson}}
Particles with integer spin that mediate [[fundamental interaction]]s:
* [[Photon]] (<math>\gamma</math>) — [[electromagnetism]]
* [[W and Z bosons]] — [[weak interaction]]
* [[Gluon]] (<math>g</math>) — [[strong interaction]]
* [[Graviton]] (hypothetical) — [[gravity]]
* [[Higgs boson]] (<math>H</math>) — mass generation mechanism

== Standard Model ==
{{Main|Standard Model}}
The [[Standard Model]] of particle physics describes 17 known elementary particles and their interactions. It has been experimentally verified to extraordinary precision but does not include [[gravity]] or [[dark matter]].

== Properties ==
Elementary particles are characterised by:
* [[Mass]]
* [[Electric charge]]
* [[Spin (physics)|Spin]]
* [[Colour charge]] (for quarks and gluons)
* [[Lepton number]] (for leptons)
* [[Baryon number]] (for quarks)

== See also ==
{{Portal|Physics}}
* [[Boson]]
* [[Fermion]]
* [[Lepton]]
* [[Neutrino]]
* [[Quark]]
* [[Standard Model]]
* [[Subatomic particle]]

== References ==
{{Reflist|30em}}

[[Category:Elementary particles| ]]
[[Category:Particle physics]]
[[Category:Concepts in physics]]
